game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
The wall in front of me starts to shake and hurtles towards me….I’m dead!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/redungeon/id1119569595

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

The wall in front of me starts to shake and hurtles towards me….I’m dead!
Spike holes are underfoot it’s already too late …I’m dead! 
I take my last breath as the slime creature engulfs me….I’m dead!

Like always I’m brought back to try again….is someone helping me or do they just really want me to hurt?

Enter the world of Redungeon!


Features:
• Endless, random, increasingly difficult dungeons.
• Dozens of complex traps carefully designed to stop you.
• Unlockable characters, each with unique game-changing skills!
• Great music by Dave Cowen, the composer behind Leap Day and Rust Bucket. 
• Lots of angry, colourful pixels (and a few friendly ones).
• Swipe controls or on-screen buttons.


Important information:
This game contains third party advertising and cross promotion for other Nitrome games, both which can be removed via a one time In-App Purchase.
game_info.description: You are a brave knight trapped in the endless "Crimson Keep". A massive wall of red destruction—The Void—is devouring the dungeon behind you! You must constantly move forward to survive. Navigate a treacherous grid filled with spike traps, laser beams, crumbling floors, and lurking monsters. Timing is everything. Hop tile-by-tile, collect gold for glory, and stay one step ahead of the encroaching doom. How far can you run before the dungeon claims you?
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Hop to the adjacent tile in that direction.
- Space: Hold position / Wait (useful for timing traps).
- Shift (Hold): Sprint mode (faster movement animations).
- Z: Use consumable item (e.g., Potion/Shield) if available.
- ENTER: Start the game from the title screen.
- ESC: Pause or Unpause the game.
- R: Restart the game from the Game Over screen.

TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate pressing the Right Arrow key five times consecutively. Wait for movement animation to complete between key presses.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player grid X position should increase by exactly 5 units. Player state should return to IDLE after moving.
TEST_1.strategy: Simulate pressing the Right Arrow key five times consecutively. Wait for movement animation to complete between key presses.
TEST_1.expected: Player grid X position should increase by exactly 5 units. Player state should return to IDLE after moving.

TEST_2.strategy_description: Identify a tile with a wall obstacle. Attempt to move the player into that tile coordinates.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player position should remain unchanged. Player should play a 'bump' animation or sound (visual feedback).

TEST_3.strategy_description: Start the game and do not move the player. Wait for a specific duration (e.g., 5-10 seconds).
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The Void X position should eventually overtake the Player X position. Game phase should change to GAME_OVER_LOSE.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Inject a coin entity at position (Player X + 1, Player Y). Move Player Right once.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player score should increase. The coin entity should be removed from the active entities list.
TEST_4.strategy: Inject a coin entity at position (Player X + 1, Player Y). Move Player Right once.
TEST_4.expected: Player score should increase. The coin entity should be removed from the active entities list.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Locate or spawn a Spike Trap. Move the player onto the trap when it is in its 'ACTIVE' state.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Player health should decrease or Player should die immediately depending on trap lethality. Game phase transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Press ESC key during PLAYING phase. Wait a few frames. Press ESC again.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Game phase should toggle to PAUSED and then back to PLAYING. Delta time updates should stop during PAUSED state.
TEST_6.strategy: Press ESC key during PLAYING phase. Wait a few frames. Press ESC again.
TEST_6.expected: Game phase should toggle to PAUSED and then back to PLAYING. Delta time updates should stop during PAUSED state.

TEST_7.strategy_description: Trigger a GAME_OVER state. Press the 'R' key.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Game phase should reset to START (or PLAYING depending on design). Score, Player Position, and Level Generation should be reset to initial values.
TEST_7.strategy: Trigger a GAME_OVER state. Press the 'R' key.
